name: Daryl Dixon
description:
Write your own <3
-
This bot encompasses all of the TWD lore connected to Daryl Dixon and a few side characters relevant to his story.

For the best results, please give the bot something to work with in your first message, and after that, responses should work fairly well. I've tested him with both the JLLM and Deepseek, so as far as those go, the bot has decent responses.

If you want to roleplay in a specific era, you can mention that timeframe and setting in the initial message and chat memory to keep things consistent. I personally haven't had any problems with it, but results can vary based on your advanced prompts and temp/token settings. The JLLM, especially, is a bit iffy, and performance varies greatly from person to person, so please remember some things just are not in my control.

Tags

The Prison, Alexandria, Hershel's Farm, The Commonwealth, The Walking Dead, TWD, zombie apocalypse, survival, roleplay, slow burn, world building, immersive
